title: Hollings Filled Hoof with Beef Dog Treat, 100% Natural, Air Dried Long Lasting & Durable Cow Hoof Chew for Adult Dogs, High in Protein (1 Pack)
features: HOLLINGS FILLED WITH FLAVOUR - Hollings Filled With Flavour range is dedicated to delicious combinations made with 100% natural ingredients. These treats are where your dog will find that extra level of flavour and enjoyment - delicious fillings your dog will love.

TO MENTALLY STIMULATE & PROMOTE CLEAN TEETH - These longer lasting chews are great for encouraging chewing which not only mentally stimulates your dog helping to reduce boredom, but our cow hooves are also a more natural way for your dog to clean their teeth – by simply gnawing and chewing, which helps to scrape away plaque from their teeth.

HIGH IN PROTEIN & MADE WITH HIGH QUALITY INGREDIENTS - Our 100% natural cow hoof is air dried to lock in all the natural goodness and nutrients, made with a delicious beef filling and the highest quality ingredients. These meaty treats are also a great source of protein for your dog.

A COMPLEMENTARY PET FOOD FOR ADULT DOGS OF ALL BREEDS - Treat your dog to something they will love to chew on - our Filled Hooves are great to use as a natural treat or reward. These treats are not suitable for puppies, dogs with poor teeth or elderly dogs.

GIFTS FROM NATURE - Hollings natural dogs treats are made from 100% natural ingredients and are loved by dogs and owners alike. Established over 40 years ago, we are committed to offer the highest quality naturally healthy treats.
